channel.title: Augusto on pwnlentoni
channel.description: Recent content in Augusto on pwnlentoni

item.title: From zero to RCE on Prusa HT90
item.description: How an afternoon of poking a 3D printer firmware with a stick turned into full compromise.

item.title: DefCamp Quals 2024 — CTF Infrastructure Vulnerability
item.description: From a popped shell to full Kubernetes cluster compromise — exploiting GCP metadata, kubelet credentials, and CSR auto-approval to bypass RBAC.

item.title: LA CTF 2024 — Jason Web Token
item.description: Abusing Python’s floating point arithmetic to forge JWT-like tokens — when float(‘inf’) meets type juggling.
